overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night. The player walks along a sidewalk next to a slatted metal wall, crosses a wide intersection, and observes flying vehicles against the night sky. The scene features heavy rain, neon lighting, and futuristic architecture typical of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street
curved modern building with extensive glass facade and illuminated windows
tall building with red neon signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady walk along a wet concrete sidewalk in a rainy cyberpunk city. A horizontal slatted metal wall runs along the left side with warm lights glowing through, while modern glass buildings and palm trees line the right. Heavy rain creates reflections on the pavement under neon city lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk transitioning to sky view

events.description: camera tilts sharply upward to reveal the night sky, moon, and flying vehicles
camera tilts back down to street level, resuming forward walking view

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to gaze at the sky while continuing to walk, then returning gaze to street level

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking across the sidewalk from right to left

entered.detail: full moon visible through the rainy night sky
futuristic flying car silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the rainy night sky with a visible moon and flying vehicles passing overhead. After a few seconds, the view returns to street level where a pedestrian crosses the path. The palm trees sway in the foreground against the teal-green sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance
approaching the opposite sidewalk after crossing the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide wet intersection toward the opposite sidewalk, navigating around crosswalk markings

entered.detail: yellow striped crosswalk lines on the wet asphalt
very tall dark skyscraper with illuminated windows rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves across a wide urban intersection with yellow crosswalk markings on rain-slicked asphalt. A flying vehicle passes overhead between the towering skyscrapers. The original sidewalk and palm trees recede into the background as the camera approaches the opposite side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with illuminated garden behind slatted wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk peering through the slatted wall at the warm illuminated interior garden

entered.detail: horizontal slatted wall with warm amber interior lighting visible through gaps
interior garden space with warm lighting visible through the slatted wall

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera walks along a new sidewalk section with a similar slatted metal wall on the left. Warm amber lights from an interior garden glow through the wall slats, contrasting with the cool teal rain outside. The camera continues forward through the heavy rain past modern street lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rain-slicked cyberpunk street that transitions from a narrow sidewalk across a wide urban intersection. It begins with a steady walk beside a slatted metal wall glowing with warm light, while neon reflections shimmer on the wet concrete beneath towering glass buildings and palm trees. As the camera tilts upward to reveal flying vehicles gliding past a moonlit, teal-green sky, the view returns to street level to navigate through a pedestrian crossing. The scene then expands across a wide intersection of rain-slicked asphalt and yellow crosswalks, with skyscrapers looming overhead as the original sidewalk recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera reaches the opposite side of the street, continuing forward past modern street lamps and another slatted wall where amber light from an interior garden contrasts with the cool, heavy rain.
